_README: This file controls how many new studies are created on each 30-second tick.
The system re-reads this file every 30 seconds.
studies_per_tick: on each tick, a random number between min and max new studies are created.
active_worklist_max_size: if the active worklist already has this many studies, no new ones are created.
tick_interval_seconds: how often the background loop runs (default 30).

studies_per_tick._comment: Create 0 to 3 new studies every 30 seconds.
